metadata.description: Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup.
Principal ID (Object ID) of the service principal.
Principal secret of the user or service principal.
Principal client ID of the user or service principal.
The Azure region where the Azure resources will be deployed.
Enable Secure Web Gateway logs ingestion.
Enable Identity service logs ingestion.
Enable firewall logs ingestion.
Enable Zero Trust Network Access logs ingestion.
Enable Secure E-Mail Gateway logs ingestion.
Enable Intrusion Detection System logs ingestion.
Name of the data collection endpoint.
Open Systems Logs API endpoint.
Open Systems Logs API connection string.
Allocated CPU resource for log processor container.
Allocated memory resource for log processor container.
Log processor container image.
Minimum number of replicas for log processor container.
Maximum number of replicas for log processor container.
Target CPU utilization for log processor container.
Enable autoscale for log processor container.
Enable collection of container logs.

logTypes.name: Zeek
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data.ts) * 1s, message = tostring(data) | project TimeGenerated, message

logTypes.name: Mail
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data.unix_timestamp) * 1s, message = tostring(data) | project TimeGenerated, message

logTypes.name: Ztna
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data.timestamp) * 1s, authority_name = tostring(data.authority_name), message = tostring(data.message), message_type = tostring(data.message_type), object_name = tostring(data.object_name), object_name_portal = tostring(data.object_name_portal), remote_address = tostring(data.remote_address), status = tostring(data.status), subject_name = tostring(data.subject_name), timestamp = tostring(data.timestamp), uuid = tostring(data.uuid), ztna_tenant = tostring(data.ztna_tenant), ztna_upstream = tostring(data.ztna_upstream), action = tostring(data.action), result = tostring(data.result) | project TimeGenerated, authority_name, message, message_type, object_name, object_name_portal, remote_address, status, subject_name, timestamp, uuid, ztna_tenant, ztna_upstream, action, result

logTypes.name: Firewall
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data.timestamp) * 1s, action = tostring(data.action), host_name = tostring(data.host_name), iface_in = tostring(data.iface_in), iface_out = tostring(data.iface_out), ip_dst = tostring(data.ip_dst), ip_src = tostring(data.ip_src), port_dst = toint(data.port_dst), port_src = toint(data.port_src), timestamp = toint(data.timestamp), zone_dst = tostring(data.zone_dst), zone_src = tostring(data.zone_src) | project TimeGenerated, action, host_name, iface_in, iface_out, ip_dst, ip_src, port_dst, port_src, timestamp, zone_dst, zone_src

logTypes.name: Authentication
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data['time']) * 1s, login = tostring(data.login), remoteAddress = data.remoteAddress, result = tostring(data.result), event_time = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data['time']) * 1s, error = tostring(data.error) | project TimeGenerated, login, remoteAddress, result, event_time, error

logTypes.name: Proxy
logTypes.transformKql: source | extend data = parse_json(RawData) | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(data.timestamp) * 1s, casb_application = tostring(data.casb_application), casb_category = tostring(data.casb_category), casb_operation = tostring(data.casb_operation), casb_risk_score = tostring(data.casb_risk_score), client_ip = tostring(data.client_ip), client_request_size = tostring(data.client_request_size), client_response_size = tostring(data.client_response_size), client_response_status = tostring(data.client_response_status), content_type = tostring(data.content_type), duration = tostring(data.duration), error_details = tostring(data.error_details), http_method = tostring(data.http_method), server_ip = tostring(data.server_ip), server_response_size = tostring(data.server_response_size), time_dns = tostring(data.time_dns), time_icap = tostring(data.time_icap), time_server = tostring(data.time_server), timestamp = toreal(data.timestamp), tls_cert_errors = tostring(data.tls_cert_errors), tls_client_cipher = tostring(data.tls_client_cipher), tls_client_max_version = tostring(data.tls_client_max_version), tls_client_version = tostring(data.tls_client_version), tls_server_cipher = tostring(data.tls_server_cipher), tls_server_max_version = tostring(data.tls_server_max_version), tls_server_version = tostring(data.tls_server_version), url = tostring(data.url), url_filter_action = tostring(data.url_filter_action), url_filter_categories = tostring(data.url_filter_categories), url_filter_result = tostring(data.url_filter_result), user_agent = tostring(data.user_agent), user_id = tostring(data.user_id), host_id = tostring(data.host_id), referer = tostring(data.referer) | project TimeGenerated, casb_application, casb_category, casb_operation, casb_risk_score, client_ip, client_request_size, client_response_size, client_response_status, content_type, duration, error_details, http_method, server_ip, server_response_size, time_dns, time_icap, time_server, timestamp, tls_cert_errors, tls_client_cipher, tls_client_max_version, tls_client_version, tls_server_cipher, tls_server_max_version, tls_server_version, url, url_filter_action, url_filter_categories, url_filter_result, user_agent, user_id, host_id, referer

variables.proxyReceiverConf:
kafka/proxy:
    brokers:
      - "${env:LOGS_API_ENDPOINT}"
    protocol_version: "1.0.0"
    use_leader_epoch: false
    logs:
      topic: proxy
      encoding: json
    auth:
      sasl:
        mechanism: PLAIN
        username: "$ConnectionString"
        password: "${env:KAFKA_PASSWORD_PROXY}"
      tls:
        insecure: false
    initial_offset: earliest
    group_id: "$$Default"
    autocommit:
      enable: false
    message_marking:
      after: true
variables.authReceiverConf:
kafka/auth:
    brokers:
      - "${env:LOGS_API_ENDPOINT}"
    protocol_version: "1.0.0"
    use_leader_epoch: false
    logs:
      topic: auth
      encoding: json
    auth:
      sasl:
        mechanism: PLAIN
        username: "$ConnectionString"
        password: "${env:KAFKA_PASSWORD_AUTH}"
      tls:
        insecure: false
    initial_offset: earliest
    group_id: "$$Default"
    autocommit:
      enable: false
    message_marking:
      after: true

variables.proxyExporterConf:
azureloganalytics/proxy:
    endpoint: "${env:DCR_ENDPOINT}"
    client_id: "${env:CLIENT_ID}"
    client_secret: "${env:CLIENT_SECRET}"
    tenant_id: "${env:TENANT_ID}"
    rule_id: "${env:PROXY_DCR_ID}"
    stream_name: "${env:PROXY_DCR_STREAM}"
    raw_log_field: body
    timeout: 30s
    sending_queue:
      enabled: false
    retry_on_failure:
      enabled: true
      initial_interval: 5s
      max_interval: 30s
      max_elapsed_time: 300s
variables.authExporterConf:
azureloganalytics/auth:
    endpoint: "${env:DCR_ENDPOINT}"
    client_id: "${env:CLIENT_ID}"
    client_secret: "${env:CLIENT_SECRET}"
    tenant_id: "${env:TENANT_ID}"
    rule_id: "${env:AUTH_DCR_ID}"
    stream_name: "${env:AUTH_DCR_STREAM}"
    raw_log_field: body
    timeout: 30s
    sending_queue:
      enabled: false
    retry_on_failure:
      enabled: true
      initial_interval: 5s
      max_interval: 30s
      max_elapsed_time: 300s

variables.enabledReceivers:
[concat('receivers:
', if(parameters('secureWebGateway'), variables('proxyReceiverConf'), ''), if(parameters('identity'), variables('authReceiverConf'), ''), if(parameters('firewall'), variables('firewallReceiverConf'), ''), if(parameters('zeroTrustNetworkAccess'), variables('ztnaReceiverConf'), ''), if(parameters('secureE-MailGateway'), variables('mailReceiverConf'), ''), if(parameters('intrusionDetectionSystem'), variables('zeekReceiverConf'), ''))]
variables.enabledExporters:
[concat('exporters:
', if(parameters('secureWebGateway'), variables('proxyExporterConf'), ''), if(parameters('identity'), variables('authExporterConf'), ''), if(parameters('firewall'), variables('firewallExporterConf'), ''), if(parameters('zeroTrustNetworkAccess'), variables('ztnaExporterConf'), ''), if(parameters('secureE-MailGateway'), variables('mailExporterConf'), ''), if(parameters('intrusionDetectionSystem'), variables('zeekExporterConf'), ''))]
variables.enabledPipelines:
[concat('service:
  pipelines:
', if(parameters('secureWebGateway'), variables('proxyPipelineConf'), ''), if(parameters('identity'), variables('authPipelineConf'), ''), if(parameters('firewall'), variables('firewallPipelineConf'), ''), if(parameters('zeroTrustNetworkAccess'), variables('ztnaPipelineConf'), ''), if(parameters('secureE-MailGateway'), variables('mailPipelineConf'), ''), if(parameters('intrusionDetectionSystem'), variables('zeekPipelineConf'), ''))]
